'''Deysum III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Deysum system/Legends|Deysum system]] of the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]].

==History==
Deysum III was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to be colonized in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]], and was named as the sector capital. Over the course of several hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Deysum III's natural resources were exploited until they were depleted. The companies left the planet, leaving behind the bureaucracy. Deysum III's surface was a [[The wastes|barren wasteland]], full of pits of deadly chemicals and waterways polluted with toxic wastes. The planet's population lived in large, overcrowded [[City/Legends|cities]],<ref name="GK" /> including [[Dragnoor]] and [[Klerint]],<ref name="CTB" /> and the wealthy lived in luxurious domes. The average citizen was forced to carry a sidearm to protect them against the criminal element that plagued the world, and often had to wait in line for [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]]. It was believed that the sector capital would be moved to a more hospitable planet.<ref name="GK" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet was located within [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space.<ref name="TEA" />

The planet served as the headquarters for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] operative [[Vo Lantes]].<ref name="AJ7">{{JournalCite|7|Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)}}</ref>

By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Deysum III had become an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]]. The Empire abandoned the planet in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />
